name: house-psm
description: House PSM — Sistema de gestao imobiliaria PSM Conquista (Dashboard TV + CRM)

scripts.lint:syntax: for f in lib/*.js api/*.js; do node -c "$f" && echo OK $f; done
scripts.lint:json: for f in vercel.json version.json manifest.json; do node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('$f','utf8'))" && echo OK $f; done
